mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM bnc_notice
WHERE bnc_notice.${searchType} like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
mapper.update: update bnc_notice set notc_number = #{notc_number}, notc_admin_id = #{notc_admin_id}, notc_title = #{notc_title}, n_udate = sysdate where notc_number = #{notc_number}, notc_contents = #{notc_contents}
